articles.title: AI Office
articles.summary: Establishes AI Office within the Commission: supports implementation, enforces GPAI rules, fosters international cooperation, provides guidance.

articles.title: European Artificial Intelligence Board
articles.summary: Board of Member State representatives: advises Commission, coordinates national authorities, contributes to uniform application.

articles.title: Tasks of the Board
articles.summary: Advise on implementation, issue opinions, share best practices, coordinate between national authorities, issue recommendations.

articles.title: Scientific Panel of Independent Experts
articles.summary: Independent experts advise AI Office on systemic risk GPAI, alert on risks, contribute to methodology development.

articles.title: Advisory Forum
articles.summary: Stakeholder forum (industry, SMEs, civil society, academia) providing expertise and advice to Board and Commission.

articles.title: Access to Pool of Experts
articles.summary: Member States may call on independent experts for market surveillance and enforcement support.

articles.title: National Competent Authorities
articles.summary: Member States designate national authorities for market surveillance and enforcement, with single point of contact.
